description: Installs Windows Terminal via Chocolatey and/or syncs bundled settings. Supports 3 modes.

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notFound: Windows Terminal not found -- will install now
messages.settingsSkipped: No Windows Terminal settings bundle found -- skipping sync
messages.disabled: Windows Terminal install is disabled in config
messages.exportNoSource: Windows Terminal LocalState directory not found -- is Windows Terminal installed?
messages.exportNoFiles: No settings.json found in Windows Terminal LocalState -- nothing to export
messages.exportComplete: Windows Terminal settings exported -- {count} item(s) saved to {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.install+settings: Install Windows Terminal and sync settings (default)
commands.install-only: Install Windows Terminal only (no settings sync)
commands.export: Export Windows Terminal settings from machine to repo for backup
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
